title: Pentagon Purge: Navy Secretary Axed. And $17 Billion Trump-Class Warship?
summary_full: US Navy Secretary John Phelan was sacked Wednesday reoportedly amid disputes with Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth over the expensive new Trump-class warships; Hegseth reportedly favours mass-produced uncrewed ships to boost numbers.
